result.stderr:
InitializeNL.DbMigrator.Postgres.Cli 1.1.0+Branch.main.Sha.cf01fc9a198aeda923d2e1007e1cdc1dbe6324ea.cf01fc9a198aeda923d2e1007e1cdc1dbe6324ea
Copyright (C) 2026 Frank Hommers

  --dry-run                 Preview mode, no changes applied (default).

  --execute                 Apply migrations for real.

  --connection-string       Database connection string. Falls back to
                            DBMIGRATOR_CONNECTION env var.

  --password                Override the password in the connection string.
                            Falls back to DBMIGRATOR_PASSWORD env var.

  --source                  Path to the migration scripts directory.

  --assembly                Path to a .dll containing CodeMigration classes with
                            [Migration] attributes.

  --target                  Target migration name (latest when omitted).

  --discovery-script        SQL file that returns connection targets (columns:
                            server, connection_string).

  --no-lock                 (Default: false) Skip distributed locking (use with
                            caution).

  --yes                     (Default: false) Skip interactive confirmation
                            prompts.

  --allow-destructive       (Default: false) Skip confirmation for destructive
                            migrations.

  --fill-gaps               (Default: false) Execute missed migrations before
                            the last applied one.

  --server-parallelism      (Default: 1) Max servers to migrate in parallel.

  --database-parallelism    (Default: 1) Max databases to migrate in parallel
                            per server.

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

options.description: Path to a .dll containing CodeMigration classes with [Migration] attributes.
Database connection string. Falls back to DBMIGRATOR_CONNECTION env var.
Max databases to migrate in parallel per server.
SQL file that returns connection targets (columns: server, connection_string).
Execute missed migrations before the last applied one.
Override the password in the connection string. Falls back to DBMIGRATOR_PASSWORD env var.
